payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Start with the overall picture, review risk, and open sensitive tools only when needed.

investigation.lookupIdle: Start with a trace or related identifier.
investigation.evidenceActive: An evidence pack is currently loaded.
investigation.evidenceIdle: Load a trace when you need to review evidence.

overview.heroActiveDescription: This summarizes recorded revenue and its conversion during {range}.
overview.heroIdleDescription: No movement was recorded during {range}, but this view still shows the selected window and the calculation inputs.
overview.windowDescription: The current readout is based on {range}.
overview.statusActive: There is activity to review. You can continue into currency detail and MXN conversion below.
overview.statusIdle: There is no activity in the selected window yet. Keep this as the control view for the period.
overview.revenueIdleDescription: When fees or adjustments land in the selected window, the currency and adjustment breakdown will appear here.
overview.conversionIdleDescription: This section will show converted totals and snapshot references once there are eligible events in the selected window.

risk.heroAttentionDescription: Use this view to decide which organizers or events deserve intervention first.
risk.heroQuietTitle: There are no meaningful alerts right now
risk.heroQuietDescription: Exposure, open cases, and policy pauses are quiet for the selected window.
risk.reviewExposureDescription: Check whether the exposed amount is concentrated in a small number of organizers or events.
risk.reviewCasesDescription: If disputes are active, prioritize groups with the most open cases before drilling deeper.
risk.reviewPausesDescription: Treat them as an operational block signal before trying to resume or keep charging.
risk.detailIdleTitle: No organizer or event clusters need follow-up right now
risk.detailIdleDescription: When exposure, open cases, or policy pauses accumulate, this area will break them down by organizer and by event.

sections.operationsNote: Manual actions stay here so they do not compete with the overall readout.

overview.title: Financial overview
overview.description: Start here to understand the overall picture before moving into operational tools.

risk.title: Debt and disputes
risk.description: Review the areas that deserve attention first when exposure or open cases appear.

fx.title: Exchange rates
fx.description: Review missing or stale rates before opening the update form.

artifacts.title: Statements and resends
artifacts.description: Review recent versions and deliveries before opening a manual operation.

cases.title: Find a case
cases.description: Find the right trace before moving into evidence.

evidence.title: Load evidence
evidence.description: Open an evidence pack only after you know which trace you want to inspect.

payments.sectionDescription: Primary readout of revenue and adjustments recorded across payments.
payments.primaryMetricDescription: Captured platform fees plus recorded adjustments in the selected window.
payments.currenciesDescription: How recorded revenue is distributed by source currency.
payments.traceabilityDescription: Window and references feeding this dashboard.
payments.sampleTracesEmpty: No trace references found in the selected window.
payments.emptyAdjustments: No financial adjustments were found for the selected window.

exposure.sectionDescription: Helps identify where staff should intervene first when debt or disputes appear.
exposure.emptyState: No debt or dispute exposure data was found for the selected window.

mxn.sectionDescription: MXN conversion view with the applied snapshot references.
mxn.tableDescription: Each source currency retains original totals and snapshot references used for MXN conversion.
mxn.emptyState: No source-currency events were found for the selected window.

fx.sectionDescription: Keep MXN rates up to date and fill gaps when coverage is missing.
fx.upsertDescription: Add or correct the rate for a specific day.
fx.ratesTableDescription: Latest daily rates configured for active currencies.
fx.emptyRates: No daily FX rates are configured yet.
fx.noActions: No missing or stale FX actions were detected for the selected window.

artifacts.sectionDescription: Review statement versions and deliveries by trace. Open a manual operation only when needed.
artifacts.formDescription: Use this form to rebuild or resend a single artifact.
artifacts.recentVersionsDescription: Available versions by trace and version number.
artifacts.recentDeliveriesDescription: Delivery attempts related to each trace.

caseLookup.sectionDescription: Trace-centric lookup for support investigations using trace IDs and related transaction identifiers.
caseLookup.searchDescription: Search by trace ID, root entity ID, payout request ID, payout quote ID, or idempotency keys.
caseLookup.queryPlaceholder: trace:..., payout request ID, idempotency key...
caseLookup.noQueryState: Enter a trace or related identifier to find the correct case before opening evidence.
caseLookup.noResultsState: We could not find a case for that identifier. Check the trace, payout request ID, or idempotency key.
caseLookup.disambiguationDescription: When one identifier maps to multiple traces, use this grouping to disambiguate.
caseLookup.disambiguationEmpty: No ambiguous matches were detected for this lookup.
caseLookup.resultsDescription: Cases are grouped by trace with normalized identifier evidence and role-appropriate metadata.

evidence.sectionDescription: Generate a consolidated trace evidence pack with lifecycle, artifacts, and policy context.
evidence.requestDescription: Load a trace-centric evidence pack for support or risk review.
evidence.noTraceState: Once you have the right trace, load it here to review its history, artifacts, and policy context.
evidence.notFoundTitle: No evidence found for that trace
evidence.notFoundState: That trace did not return an evidence pack. Verify the identifier or go back to case lookup.
evidence.summaryDescription: Canonical trace history, key timestamps, and redaction metadata.
evidence.policyContextEmpty: No additional policy context was found for this trace.
evidence.eventsDescription: Canonical trace events used to build case evidence.
